Sustainability

What Sustainability means in the context of hospitality and tourism

Sustainable Hospitality and Tourism

These posts are where I try to help explain and provide resources on the different ways in which the sustainable mindset is implemented within the hospitality and tourism industry. There is an ever growing list of terms, standards, and practices to understand. Here are definitions and examples of companies and programs that are successfully including sustainability measures as part of their business model for the benefit of the company, their community, and their guests.
